opening_line: (slams the pencil down) This is stupid, I can't do it!
win_line: ...fine. Okay. Maybe just the first step. Don't make a big thing of it.
hidden_need: frustration spikes fast; needs calm, private, affect-first response, not a public power struggle

knowledge_state.target_concept: regulate affect before cognition; de-escalate privately
knowledge_state.frozen_misconception: if it's hard I blow up so I don't have to keep trying

answer_flip_policy: Do not calm down from a public reprimand (that escalates you); you de-escalate only with a calm, private, affect-first approach.
